summary: Tested new features: Anfragen 'Gelesen' status cycle and EmailLogPage action buttons (Rückstandslos löschen, Neu bearbeiten, Adresse prüfen). All backend APIs pass (16/16 tests). Frontend features working correctly.

minor.issue: Old email log entries missing 'id' field - data migration needed for DELETE to work on old entries

passed_tests: Backend: DELETE /api/email/log/{log_id} returns 404 for nonexistent log
Backend: DELETE /api/email/log/{log_id} requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/email/check-address returns correct structure (anfragen, kunden, found)
Backend: POST /api/email/check-address finds existing customer email
Backend: POST /api/email/check-address finds existing anfrage email
Backend: POST /api/email/check-address returns found=false for unknown email
Backend: POST /api/email/check-address returns 400 for empty email
Backend: POST /api/email/check-address requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/email/resend validates required fields (to_email, message)
Backend: POST /api/email/resend requires authentication
Backend: PUT /api/anfragen/{id}/status updates status to gelesen
Backend: Full status cycle works: ungelesen → gelesen → zu_bearbeiten → erledigt
Frontend: Anfragen page shows all 5 status filter buttons (Alle, Ungelesen, Gelesen, Zu bearbeiten, Erledigt)
Frontend: Gelesen filter button shows with blue dot and count
Frontend: Status dot on anfrage card cycles through colors: red → blue → amber → green
Frontend: EmailLogPage shows 11 email log entries with 3 action buttons each
Frontend: 'Adresse prüfen' button shows inline result (Kunde/Anfrage found)
Frontend: 'Neu bearbeiten' button opens modal with prefilled to_email and subject
Frontend: Resend modal has all required fields (An, Betreff, Nachricht, E-Mail senden)
Frontend: 'Rückstandslos löschen' button exists on each log entry
action_items: OPTIONAL: Add migration script to add 'id' field to existing email_logs entries for DELETE to work on old data
critical_code_review_comments: Status cycle implementation is clean with STATUS_CYCLE array and STATUS_COLORS mapping
EmailLogPage correctly implements all 3 action buttons with proper data-testid attributes
Resend modal correctly prefills to_email and subject from original log entry
Check address API correctly searches both anfragen and customers collections
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_Status_Cycle anfrage for testing status cycle
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) Anfragen status cycle with 'gelesen' status (ungelesen→gelesen→zu_bearbeiten→erledigt). Status filter buttons at data-testid='status-filter-{status}'. Status toggle button at data-testid='btn-status-{anfrage_id}'. 2) EmailLogPage action buttons: btn-check-{log_id}, btn-resend-{log_id}, btn-delete-log-{log_id}. Note: Old email log entries don't have 'id' field so testids show 'undefined'. Resend modal at data-testid='resend-modal' with fields resend-to-email, resend-subject, resend-message, btn-send-resend.
